creator: edwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Could you please post your questions to one of the following mailinglists: 

- questions@freebsd.org (generic questions) 
- stable@freebsd.org (since you are running 6.3) 

There you have a much better chance of getting an answer than when 
it is in the bugtracking system.
